markdownRemark.html:
A collection of interesting things I’ve discovered this month:

  • WallabyJS - commercial tool for JavaScript/TypeScript testing. The time travel debugging looks very useful.
  • How to migrate from Newtonsoft.Json to System.Text.Json - this lists all the differences and what isn’t supported - quite a lot currently.
  • Designing for Performance - online version of the book.
  • Blazor Contacts - “A project template for OData API, IdentityServer4 auth, and server-side Blazor”
  • Nick Craver - Binding Redirects
  • Current Status of Python Packaging - 2019
  • ASP.NET Core MVC 3.x – AddMvc(), AddMvcCore(), AddControllers() and other bootstrapping approaches
  • ASP.NET Core Integration Testing & Mocking using Moq
  • AWS to Azure services comparison
  • Nailing Your Naming Convention With Azure Policy
